# Fra-Ber Reef Descaler and Limescale Remover for Boats and Dinghies

-

notifications_active
Notify me



### THE BENEFITS OF REEF

Reef by Fra-Ber is a descaler and limescale remover for boats, dinghies and watercraft that’s easy to apply, simplifying the removal of tough dirt in hard-to-reach places.

Main features:

- 
Removes oxidation and rust: it is an acidic detergent formulated to effectively remove limescale deposits, saltpetre efflorescence, rust, silicates, oxides and common boat stains like algae, waterline marks, mucilage, barnacles and limescale;

- 
Suitable for all boats: it can be used to clean boats, dinghies, tenders and sailboats;

- 
Ideal for cleaning the hull and metal surfaces: it can be used on the hull and on metal elements such as windshields, stanchions, ladders, roll cages, and chrome parts of boats and vessels;

- 
No added phosphates, EDTA and NTA*: The formulation takes into account the main environmentally hazardous substances to be avoided such as phosphates, EDTA and NTA.

*May contain traces.

### REEF IS IDEAL

- For removing stubborn sea grime on all types of boat hulls;

- For removing rust and oxidation on metal surfaces caused by salt water and salt deposits;

- As a safe product for use on all types of watercraft including boats, sailboats, dinghies and tenders.

### HOW TO USE REEF

We recommend using Reef as a descaler and limescale remover for boats.

Main steps:

- Spray the product evenly on the area to be treated;

- Leave on for 5 minutes before rinsing;

- In the case of stubborn dirt, repeat the procedure, using a brush or sponge if necessary.

Use: use the product pure.

Precautions: avoid prolonged contact with aluminium, linoleum and painted surfaces.

### SAFETY INFO & DATA SHEET

PRODUCT CODE

75130 - R:14 - REEF 750 ML

Also contains among other ingredients**: Less than 5%: Nonionic surfactants. Fragrances. Preservatives (phenoxyethanol,benzisothiazolinone).
